description: This class contains status information for an OP save task. Can be casted to a str type to return the filepath of the saved file.

members.name: filePath
members.description: Returns the filepath of the saved file.

members.name: op
members.description: Returns reference to the OP node that was saved.

methods.name: isCompleted
methods.description: Returns true if the file finished saving, and false otherwise.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the FileSaveStatus Class wiki page
